feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)

entry.title: Mission: Get Dick Pregnant
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,679Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 30

Summary: Dick gets shot during a mission and a doctors tells Bruce he's had a miscarriage. This is 2 months after the sex pollen thing but Dick didn't know about it.Bruce is feeling guilty for everything that's happened, and when Dick feels better and goes back home, they all have A Very Important Talk.Turns out, after a lot of thinking, Dick wants to try to get pregnant... this time intentionally. And he wants Bruce to reverse his vasectomy!How will this affect their lives? How will their friends and other heroes act when it's known a few intimate details about their whole relationship?

entry.title: High Top Tumbles
entry.summary:
Author: Dickcest

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,776Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: The early morning lights were peaking through the holes of the practice tent. Jason, after more grumbling, had been convinced to leave the trailer and slink off with Dick. "The fate of the mission depends on you, Jason Todd, and your ability to make this one successful pass," Dick was bounding up onto the mats, gesturing grandly at the netting that would serve as their fail safe.

entry.title: Consanguinity
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,199Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: Sometimes Dick thought that the moment Bruce had first introduced Jason—scrawny, defiant, drowning in the green and red and yellow of Dick's old Robin suit—something had short-circuited behind his eyes. Rewired the whole goddamn motherboard. Because he remembered standing in the Cave, twenty years old and furious at Bruce for replacing him, and then this kid had turned around, and the pixie boots were too big and the cape pooled on the floor like a puddle of gold, and Dick's anger had evaporated into something he didn't have vocabulary for.DickJay Week 2026 - Day 3 - Incest Kink

entry.title: The Royal Court of Gotham, Welcomes You (not)
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,445Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 3)Fairytale Retelling | Animal Hybrid/Features | Incest Kink | Escaping Arranged Marriage Before she even sent that outrageous letter, someone should have told Princess Amelie that Margrave Jason Todd was, in fact, not some sort of black sheep to the Royal Family or a hidden bastard son, but the beloved son of King Bruce Wayne, and the Second Prince of the Kingdom of Gotham, who had explicitly requested the position of Margrave, and not, as she believes, been exhiled to it. Someone should have also warned Princess Amelie on the Royal Court's open secret that the charming and handsome First Prince Richard Wayne was intensively looking to marry said Margrave, come hell or high water. If anything, someone should have definitely warned Princess Amelie and her Lady in waiting to stay away from any mentions of pure bloodlines anywhere near Dick, and definitely refrain from insulting Jason in front of him.

entry.title: This Kind Of Lux Just Ain’t For Us, We Crave A Different Type Of Lust
entry.summary:
Author: nursal1060

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,760Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: Jason finds out on the eve of his 18th birthday that he’s been betrothed without his knowledge to a neighboring kingdom’s ruler to build an alliance. The man is known to be cruel and violent - not to mention his more than twice Jason’s age. The wedding is set for tomorrow evening, with the marriage contracts having been drafted already.The only way that Jason can break the marriage pact is by bedding another royal - however, most royals fear Jason’s lineage. However, Jason does trust one person to bed him properly - and luckily for both of them, Dick doesn’t care about breaking rules. DickJay Week: Escaping An Arranged Marriage AND Incest Kink

entry.title: Hummingbird Heartbeat
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,218Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: "Little Wing~" he calls, sing-songing voice echoing down the halls. He relishes in the way it makes the heartbeat he follows flutter. Fear. Anticipation. He could move silent as a shadow if he wishes, but he lets his footfalls echo. Each one bringing him closer to his sweet little bird. He opens the door to the scent of sweet life and fear. Even after all this time, his precious bird's fear always betrays him. Jason lays in bed, a sheet covering his bare lower half. His eyes are closed, and his chest rises and falls in a steady rhythm. Practiced. Convincing enough, if it had been a human stalking toward his bedside, sinking so softly to the mattress that it doesn't even dip under his weight. He can fake the breathing of sleep. He can fake the stillness of sleep. But he can't fake the hummingbird flutter of his heart. The scent of fear as his blood pumps through his veins.______Vampire King Dick Grayson kept Jason for himself instead of killing him DickJay Week 2026 Day 1 DC vs Vampires | Forced Proximity | Heartbeat Kink | Jason Reluctantly Accepting Comfort

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,398Chapters: 2/16Kudos: 130

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,279Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 146

Summary: That was the thing no one warned you about. Not Bruce, not Alfred, not any of the dozens of mentors and teammates and temporary allies who'd cycled through his life like seasons. Something with teeth and claws and a hunger that no amount of reason could cage.DickJay Week 2026 - Day 2 - Obsessive Dick

entry.title: I'm Here
entry.summary:
Author: DovesNotDead

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,256Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 57

Summary: "Jay, sweetheart," Dick tried as he reached the pile of blankets that likely held his boyfriend. Admittedly, it was a little hard to tell just judging by the lump under the duvet, as the guest bed was also Jason's go-to place to store all his gifted blankets, pillows, and stuffed animals that he'd compiled over the year of Dick dating him.Jason isn't used to having someone there to comfort him. Dick is trying to change that.
